'''hahulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycosaccharide|mycosaccharide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-h-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycosaccharide|mycosaccharide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hahulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæhilith|hæhilith]] || [[word:hæhilij|hæhilij]] || [[word:hæhilish|hæhilish]] || [[word:hæhili|hæhili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hahuhuluth|hahuhuluth]] || [[word:hahuhuluj|hahuhuluj]] || [[word:hahuhulush|hahuhulush]] || [[word:hahuhulu|hahuhulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hahuluth|hahuluth]] || [[word:hahuluj|hahuluj]] || [[word:hahulush|hahulush]] || [[word:hahulu|hahulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hahufluth|hahufluth]] || [[word:hahufluj|hahufluj]] || [[word:hahuflush|hahuflush]] || [[word:hahufluf|hahufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hahuluthu|hahuluthu]] || [[word:hahuluju|hahuluju]] || [[word:hahulushu|hahulushu]] || [[word:hahuluku|hahuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hahuluth|hahuluth]] || [[word:hahuluj|hahuluj]] || [[word:hahulush|hahulush]] || [[word:hahulu|hahulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hahuluthul|hahuluthul]] || [[word:hahulujul|hahulujul]] || [[word:hahulushul|hahulushul]] || [[word:hahulukul|hahulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hahuluthuthu|hahuluthuthu]] || [[word:hahulujuju|hahulujuju]] || [[word:hahulushushu|hahulushushu]] || [[word:hahuluku|hahuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hahuluthun|hahuluthun]] || [[word:hahulujun|hahulujun]] || [[word:hahulushun|hahulushun]] || [[word:hahulukun|hahulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hahuluthuoro|hahuluthuoro]] || [[word:hahulujuoro|hahulujuoro]] || [[word:hahulushuoro|hahulushuoro]] || [[word:hahulukuoro|hahulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
